message:
refactor(lab): clippy lints and idiomatic Option handling in snapshot_restore

- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] to validate() function which
  necessarily has many validation steps
- Replace .map_or(false, |r| predicate) with .is_some_and(|r| predicate)
  for cleaner Option<T> boolean conversion (Rust 1.70+ idiom)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
